system.requirement: Your First Mate is your strong right hand.

abilities.description: Your Mate keeps an eye on the ship and crew. When you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.a2d7793b23c17489]{Secure an Advantage} or @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.3f5a834fa3fea5d1]{Gain Ground} by talking through a situation with your first mate, you may roll +integrity and take +1 momentum on a hit.

When you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.3782f1b3c8ca8b88]{Withstand Damage} and roll on the miss table, your first mate will do what they can to help. Roll twice on the table and choose either result.

The Mate can pilot the ship independently. When you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.e6ed148eff82c171]{Face Danger} by handing over control to your first mate in an emergency, or to allow them to act while you are offboard, you may roll +integrity. If you do, take +1 momentum on a hit.
